name: opengeni
description: Self-hostable managed agent service for long-running infrastructure work.

scripts.dev:api: set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; cd apps/api && bun run dev
scripts.dev:worker: set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; cd apps/worker && bun run dev
scripts.dev:web: set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; cd apps/web && bun run dev
scripts.db:migrate: set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; cd packages/db && bun run migrate
scripts.db:provision-roles: set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; cd packages/db && bun run provision-roles
scripts.db:generate: set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; cd packages/db && bun run generate
scripts.typecheck: cd packages/contracts && bun run typecheck && cd ../agent-proto && bun run typecheck && cd ../config && bun run typecheck && cd ../deployment && bun run typecheck && cd ../db && bun run typecheck && cd ../events && bun run typecheck && cd ../github && bun run typecheck && cd ../storage && bun run typecheck && cd ../documents && bun run typecheck && cd ../observability && bun run typecheck && cd ../runtime && bun run typecheck && cd ../core && bun run typecheck && cd ../sdk && bun run typecheck && cd ../react && bun run typecheck && cd ../testing && bun run typecheck && cd ../../apps/api && bun run typecheck && cd ../worker && bun run typecheck && cd ../web && bun run typecheck
scripts.test:integration: bun test --timeout 30000 ./test/integration/api.integration.ts && bun test --timeout 30000 ./test/integration/db.integration.ts && bun test --timeout 30000 ./test/integration/nats.integration.ts && bun test --timeout 30000 ./test/integration/selfhosted-control-transport.integration.ts && bun test --timeout 120000 ./test/integration/selfhosted-auth-callout.integration.ts && bun test --timeout 30000 ./test/integration/workspace-isolation.integration.ts && bun test --timeout 30000 ./test/integration/temporal-workflow.integration.ts && bun test --timeout 30000 ./test/integration/worker-activity.integration.ts && bun test --timeout 30000 ./test/integration/worker-restart.integration.ts
scripts.test:e2e: bun scripts/run-browser-e2e.ts && bun test ./test/e2e/sandbox.e2e.ts && bun test --timeout 360000 ./test/e2e/channel-a.e2e.ts
scripts.test:all: bun run test:unit && bun run test:integration && bun run test:e2e
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run test:unit && cd packages/sdk && bun run build && cd ../react && bun run build && bun run demo:build && cd ../../apps/web && bun run build
scripts.check:full: bun run check && bun run test:integration && bun run test:e2e
scripts.check:workspace-billing: bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run test:integration && bun scripts/check-workspace-billing-static.ts && cd apps/web && bun run build && cd ../.. && bun run test:e2e
